case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JESSE GAULT ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66216335) AS TO DEFENDANT GAULT, JESSE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-16-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-16-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAULT, JESSE $4,123.13 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,382.08, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 66216335) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 66216335) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GAULT, JESSE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2019

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100048013), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUL-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-10-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT GAULT, JESSE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66216335) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
